description: Translate reviewed paper notes into a bounded experiment specification using approved templates.

required_inputs.name: paper_id
required_inputs.description: Stable identifier for the source paper or note bundle.

required_inputs.name: source_notes
required_inputs.description: Curated notes or extracted method details to ground the run.

required_inputs.name: dataset_uri
required_inputs.description: Resolved dataset location for the derived experiment.
